testcase.name: picks_srv_resolves_values_values_predicate_are_resolved_on_init
testcase.failure: Expected `picks_resolved()` to be identical to `picks(...)`. Differences: Component "values": Component "choices": Numeric: lengths (10, 2) differ Component "values": Component "selected": Numeric: lengths (10, 2) differ Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─shiny::testServer(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:339:5 2. │ ├─shiny:::withMockContext(...) 3. │ │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ │ └─base::force(code) 27. │ └─rlang::eval_tidy(quosure, mask, rlang::caller_env()) 28. └─testthat::expect_identical(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:343:9

testcase.name: picks_srv_resolves_values_values_numeric_are_adjusted_to_possible_range
testcase.system-out: None of the `choices/selected`: <dbl> are subset of: 5.1, 4.9, 4.7, 4.6, 5, 5.4.... Emptying choices... Backtrace: ▆ 1. └─shiny::testServer(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:387:5 2. ├─shiny:::withMockContext(session, rlang::exec(app, !!!args)) 3. │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ └─base::force(code) 27. ├─rlang::exec(app, !!!args) 28. ├─teal.picks (local) `<fn>`(id = "test", picks = `<picks>`, data = `<rctvExpr>`) 29. └─teal.picks:::picks_srv.picks(...) 30. └─shiny::moduleServer(...) 31. ├─session$setReturned(callModule(module, id, session = session)) 32. └─shiny::callModule(module, id, session = session) 33. ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 34. │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 35. │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 36. │ └─base::force(expr) 37. └─teal.picks (local) module(childScope$input, childScope$output, childScope, ...) 38. ├─shiny::reactiveVal(...) 39. │ └─ReactiveVal$new(value, label) 40. │ └─shiny (local) initialize(...) 41. ├─teal.picks:::restoreValue(...) 42. └─teal.picks::resolver(picks, shiny::isolate(data())) 43. ├─teal.picks:::determine(x[[i]], data = data_i) 44. └─teal.picks:::determine.values(x[[i]], data = data_i) 45. └─teal.picks:::.determine_choices(x$choices, data = data) 46. └─teal.picks:::.determine_delayed(data = data, x = x)

testcase.name: picks_srv_resolves_values_values_numeric_are_adjusted_to_possible_range
testcase.failure: Expected `picks_resolved()` to be identical to `test_picks`. Differences: Component "values": names for current but not for target Component "values": Length mismatch: comparison on first 0 components Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─shiny::testServer(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:387:5 2. │ ├─shiny:::withMockContext(...) 3. │ │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ │ └─base::force(code) 27. │ └─rlang::eval_tidy(quosure, mask, rlang::caller_env()) 28. └─testthat::expect_identical(picks_resolved(), test_picks) at test-0-module_picks.R:393:9

testcase.name: picks_srv_resolves_values_values_range_are_preserved_when_related_data_lacks_finite_values
testcase.system-out: None of the `choices/selected`: <dbl> are subset of: NA Emptying choices... Backtrace: ▆ 1. └─shiny::testServer(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:405:5 2. ├─shiny:::withMockContext(session, rlang::exec(app, !!!args)) 3. │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ └─base::force(code) 27. ├─rlang::exec(app, !!!args) 28. ├─teal.picks (local) `<fn>`(id = "id", picks = `<picks>`, data = `<rctvExpr>`) 29. └─teal.picks:::picks_srv.picks(id = "id", picks = `<picks>`, data = `<rctvExpr>`) 30. └─shiny::moduleServer(...) 31. ├─session$setReturned(callModule(module, id, session = session)) 32. └─shiny::callModule(module, id, session = session) 33. ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 34. │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 35. │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 36. │ └─base::force(expr) 37. └─teal.picks (local) module(childScope$input, childScope$output, childScope, ...) 38. ├─shiny::reactiveVal(...) 39. │ └─ReactiveVal$new(value, label) 40. │ └─shiny (local) initialize(...) 41. ├─teal.picks:::restoreValue(...) 42. └─teal.picks::resolver(picks, shiny::isolate(data())) 43. ├─teal.picks:::determine(x[[i]], data = data_i) 44. └─teal.picks:::determine.values(x[[i]], data = data_i) 45. └─teal.picks:::.determine_choices(x$choices, data = data) 46. └─teal.picks:::.determine_delayed(data = data, x = x)

testcase.name: picks_srv_resolves_values_values_range_are_preserved_when_related_data_lacks_finite_values
testcase.failure: Expected `picks_resolved()` to be identical to `test_picks`. Differences: Component "values": names for current but not for target Component "values": Length mismatch: comparison on first 0 components Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─shiny::testServer(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:405:5 2. │ ├─shiny:::withMockContext(...) 3. │ │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ │ └─base::force(code) 27. │ └─rlang::eval_tidy(quosure, mask, rlang::caller_env()) 28. └─testthat::expect_identical(picks_resolved(), test_picks) at test-0-module_picks.R:409:9

testcase.name: picks_srv_resolves_values_values_predicate_are_emptied_with_warning_when_data_returns_infinite
testcase.failure: Expected `picks_resolved()` to be identical to `test_picks`. Differences: Component "values": names for target but not for current Component "values": Length mismatch: comparison on first 0 components Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─testthat::expect_warning(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:422:5 2. │ └─testthat:::quasi_capture(...) 3. │ ├─testthat (local) .capture(...) 4. │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 5. │ └─rlang::eval_bare(quo_get_expr(.quo), quo_get_env(.quo)) 6. ├─shiny::testServer(...) 7. │ ├─shiny:::withMockContext(...) 8. │ │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 9. │ │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 10. │ │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 11. │ │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 12. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 13. │ │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 14. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 15. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 16. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 17. │ │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 18. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 19. │ │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 20. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 21. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 22. │ │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 23. │ │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 24. │ │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 25. │ │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 26. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 27. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 28. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 29. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 30. │ │ └─withr::with_options(...) 31. │ │ └─base::force(code) 32. │ └─rlang::eval_tidy(quosure, mask, rlang::caller_env()) 33. └─testthat::expect_identical(picks_resolved(), test_picks) at test-0-module_picks.R:429:11

testcase.name: picks_srv_resolves_values_values_predicate_are_set_to_delayed_range_when_data_range_returns_infinite
testcase.failure: Expected `picks_resolved()` to be identical to `test_picks`. Differences: Component "values": Component "choices": Numeric: lengths (35, 2) differ Component "values": Component "selected": Numeric: lengths (35, 2) differ Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─shiny::testServer(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:443:5 2. │ ├─shiny:::withMockContext(...) 3. │ │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ │ └─base::force(code) 27. │ └─rlang::eval_tidy(quosure, mask, rlang::caller_env()) 28. └─testthat::expect_identical(picks_resolved(), test_picks) at test-0-module_picks.R:449:9

testcase.name: picks_srv_resolves_values_values_predicate_are_set_to_data_range_when_predicate_doesn_t_match_anything
testcase.system-out: None of the `choices/selected`: <fn> are subset of: 5.1, 4.9, 4.7, 4.6, 5, 5.4.... Emptying choices... Backtrace: ▆ 1. └─shiny::testServer(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:460:5 2. ├─shiny:::withMockContext(session, rlang::exec(app, !!!args)) 3. │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ └─base::force(code) 27. ├─rlang::exec(app, !!!args) 28. ├─teal.picks (local) `<fn>`(id = "id", picks = `<picks>`, data = `<rctvExpr>`) 29. └─teal.picks:::picks_srv.picks(id = "id", picks = `<picks>`, data = `<rctvExpr>`) 30. └─shiny::moduleServer(...) 31. ├─session$setReturned(callModule(module, id, session = session)) 32. └─shiny::callModule(module, id, session = session) 33. ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 34. │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 35. │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 36. │ └─base::force(expr) 37. └─teal.picks (local) module(childScope$input, childScope$output, childScope, ...) 38. ├─shiny::reactiveVal(...) 39. │ └─ReactiveVal$new(value, label) 40. │ └─shiny (local) initialize(...) 41. ├─teal.picks:::restoreValue(...) 42. └─teal.picks::resolver(picks, shiny::isolate(data())) 43. ├─teal.picks:::determine(x[[i]], data = data_i) 44. └─teal.picks:::determine.values(x[[i]], data = data_i) 45. └─teal.picks:::.determine_choices(x$choices, data = data) 46. └─teal.picks:::.determine_delayed(data = data, x = x)

testcase.name: picks_srv_resolves_values_values_predicate_are_set_to_data_range_when_predicate_doesn_t_match_anything
testcase.failure: Expected `picks_resolved()` to be identical to `test_picks`. Differences: Component "values": names for current but not for target Component "values": Length mismatch: comparison on first 0 components Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─shiny::testServer(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:460:5 2. │ ├─shiny:::withMockContext(...) 3. │ │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ │ └─base::force(code) 27. │ └─rlang::eval_tidy(quosure, mask, rlang::caller_env()) 28. └─testthat::expect_identical(picks_resolved(), test_picks) at test-0-module_picks.R:466:9

testcase.name: picks_srv_resolves_values_values_character_are_set_to_data_range_when_column_is_numeric
testcase.failure: Expected `picks_resolved()` to be identical to `test_picks`. Differences: Component "values": Component "choices": Modes: character, numeric Component "values": Component "choices": target is character, current is numeric Component "values": Component "selected": Modes: character, numeric Component "values": Component "selected": target is character, current is numeric Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─shiny::testServer(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:477:5 2. │ ├─shiny:::withMockContext(...) 3. │ │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ │ └─base::force(code) 27. │ └─rlang::eval_tidy(quosure, mask, rlang::caller_env()) 28. └─testthat::expect_identical(picks_resolved(), test_picks) at test-0-module_picks.R:483:9

testcase.name: picks_srv_resolves_picks_pick_elements_are_resolved_sequentially
testcase.failure: Expected `picks_resolved()` to be identical to `picks_expected`. Differences: Component "values": Component "choices": Numeric: lengths (27, 2) differ Component "values": Component "selected": Numeric: lengths (27, 2) differ Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─shiny::testServer(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:576:5 2. │ ├─shiny:::withMockContext(...) 3. │ │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ │ └─base::force(code) 27. │ └─rlang::eval_tidy(quosure, mask, rlang::caller_env()) 28. └─testthat::expect_identical(picks_resolved(), picks_expected) at test-0-module_picks.R:590:9

testcase.name: picks_srv_resolves_picks_interactively_Setting_numeric_variable_resolves_values_to_be_a_slider_input_with_variable_range
testcase.failure: Expected `rvest::html_attr(...)` to be identical to `as.character(range(iris$Sepal.Length))`. Differences: Lengths differ: 0 is not 2 Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─shiny::testServer(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:836:5 2. │ ├─shiny:::withMockContext(...) 3. │ │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ │ └─base::force(code) 27. │ └─rlang::eval_tidy(quosure, mask, rlang::caller_env()) 28. └─testthat::expect_identical(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:841:9

testcase.name: picks_srv_resolves_picks_interactively_switching_variables_input_changes_values_input
testcase.failure: Expected `rvest::html_attr(...)` to be identical to `as.character(range(iris$Sepal.Length))`. Differences: Lengths differ: 0 is not 2 Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─shiny::testServer(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:855:5 2. │ ├─shiny:::withMockContext(...) 3. │ │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ │ └─base::force(code) 27. │ └─rlang::eval_tidy(quosure, mask, rlang::caller_env()) 28. └─testthat::expect_identical(...) at test-0-module_picks.R:867:9

testcase.name: ranged_is_resolved_works
testcase.system-out: None of the `choices/selected`: <range> are subset of: 21, 22.8, 21.4, 18.7, 18.1.... Emptying choices... Backtrace: ▆ 1. └─teal.picks::resolver(data = list(`mtcars label` = mtcars), x = p) at test-tidyselect_helpers.R:16:5 2. ├─teal.picks:::determine(x[[i]], data = data_i) 3. └─teal.picks:::determine.values(x[[i]], data = data_i) 4. └─teal.picks:::.determine_selected(...) 5. └─teal.picks:::.determine_delayed(data = data, x = x)

testcase.name: ranged_is_resolved_works
testcase.failure: Expected `out$values$selected` to have length 2. Actual length: 0.

testcase.name: ranged_is_resolved_matches_expected_outcome
testcase.system-out: None of the `choices/selected`: <range> are subset of: 21, 22.8, 21.4, 18.7, 18.1.... Emptying choices... Backtrace: ▆ 1. └─teal.picks::resolver(data = list(`mtcars label` = mtcars), x = p) at test-tidyselect_helpers.R:27:5 2. ├─teal.picks:::determine(x[[i]], data = data_i) 3. └─teal.picks:::determine.values(x[[i]], data = data_i) 4. └─teal.picks:::.determine_selected(...) 5. └─teal.picks:::.determine_delayed(data = data, x = x)

testcase.name: ranged_is_resolved_matches_expected_outcome
testcase.error: Error in `predicate(x, ...)`: object 'x' not found Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─testthat::expect_equal(out$values$selected, range(mtcars$mpg[r(mtcars$mpg)])) at test-tidyselect_helpers.R:28:5 2. │ └─testthat::quasi_label(enquo(expected), expected.label) 3. │ └─rlang::eval_bare(expr, quo_get_env(quo)) 4. └─teal.picks (local) r(mtcars$mpg) 5. └─teal.picks (local) predicate(x, ...)
